groupings.title: Default Study
groupings.description: Study the real situation deeply before any answer, decision, or action.

groupings.title: Default Action
groupings.description: A joyful default for turning clear intent into responsible action and a finished result.

groupings.title: Product Experience
groupings.description: Imagine you are the user and improve every part they can notice, use, wait for, or live with.

groupings.title: Engineering Views
groupings.description: Three views for finding a local cause, keeping one shared rule, and making a full path work.

groupings.title: Engineering Domains
groupings.description: Keep software simple and type-safe, make effects explicit through the whole program, prove every rule you can, and test the important risk that is left.
